verdict: The chart has good rhythmic alignment and generally comfortable streams, but it is severely undermined by multiple physically impossible 3-panel jumps during holds.

issues.problem: JUMP LR occurs while HOLD U is still active (62.944 to 63.406), requiring 3 panels to be pressed simultaneously, which is impossible/unintended for standard Medium single play.
JUMP LR occurs while HOLD D is active (74.254 to 75.639), creating another physical 3-panel conflict.
JUMP LR overlaps with HOLD U (79.563 to 80.024), forcing an uncomfortable 3-panel press.
